SpaceBF
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which SpaceBF installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using SpaceBF, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load SpaceBF/0.2.0-2026-01-08-foss-2025a-R-4.5.1
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
